detail.definition: original LC2 branch evidence emitted by the same source-current LGRC runtime run, or deterministic replay of that same already-recorded runtime trace, inside the declared branch window, before collapse-window start, with branch-specific support/coherence and boundary/flux traces

detail.constraint: required when selected reason is susceptibility_delta_conditioned

detail.allowed_claim_ceiling: bounded artifact-level live-continuation collapse / selection-geometry candidate

purpose: freeze schema, ladders, controls, AP rules, and claim boundaries before N23 positive probes

ap4_dependency_status.constraint: inventory/meta AP values are invalid for candidate rows

ap5_dependency_status.constraint: inventory/meta AP values are invalid for candidate rows

artifact_manifest.constraint: positive LC support cannot be report/context/contract/closeout only

artifact_paths_equal_manifest_paths.constraint: parallel artifact path list must match manifest paths

artifact_sha256_equal_manifest_sha256.constraint: parallel artifact hash list must match manifest sha256 values

boundary_integrity_floor_value.constraint: must be frozen before positive probe

branch_distinguishability_threshold.constraint: must be frozen before positive probe

coherence_floor_value.constraint: must be frozen before positive probe

collapse_persistence_ratio_threshold.constraint: must be frozen before positive probe

collapse_window.constraint: must start after branch window ends

collapsed_continuation_trace.constraint: source-current collapse trace required for LC3+

counterfactual_branch_retention_trace.constraint: immutable pre-collapse audit evidence, not continued active branch

flux_or_leakage_bound.constraint: must be frozen before positive probe

live_branch_set_trace.constraint: at least two source-current same-run branch records required for LC2+

live_continuation_collapse_claim_allowed.constraint: true only when all LC/AP/replay/control gates pass

n19_native_readiness_boundary_consumptio.constraint: N19 is AP-gap boundary only, not evidence

n22_inherited_delta_used_as_selection_ev.constraint: inherited N22 delta may provide context but cannot be N23 selection evidence

n22_source_closeout_status.constraint: prefixed inherited N22 closeout status required

n23_susceptibility_expression_trace.constraint: required when selected reason is susceptibility_delta_conditioned

producer_selected_branch_label_absent.constraint: false demotes or blocks LC support

route_or_branch_conditioned.constraint: true requires AP4 row-local dependency status

row_decision.constraint: supported alone does not allow unsafe claims

same_basin_continuation_rule.required_source: N20 I5 same-basin rule from I1

same_basin_drift_bound.constraint: must be frozen before positive probe

selected_branch_source_current_reason.constraint: must be computed from pre/in-collapse traces

semantic_choice_claim_allowed.constraint: semantic choice remains blocked in every row

source_consumable_contract_row.constraint: same-basin/control contract row must not drift

source_consumable_contract_row_digest.constraint: must match I1 digest over N20 I5 same-basin/control contract row

source_contract_row.constraint: primitive contract source row must not drift

source_contract_row_digest.constraint: must match I1 digest over N20 I4 primitive contract row

source_current_inputs.constraint: must be LGRC runtime or replay emitted, not report-built

source_output_digest.constraint: records the source I1 inventory digest consumed

support_floor_value.constraint: must be frozen before positive probe

claim_boundary_schema.allowed_claim_ceiling: bounded artifact-level live-continuation collapse / selection-geometry candidate

source_current_branch_definition.definition: original LC2 branch evidence emitted by the same source-current LGRC runtime run, or deterministic replay of that same already-recorded runtime trace, inside the declared branch window, before collapse-window start, with branch-specific support/coherence and boundary/flux traces
